creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2008-04-02 09:06:34 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-toolkits/qwt4    Makefile pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/qwt5    Makefile pkg-descr

  Log:
  - Resolve conflict between qwt 4.x and 5.x by rename libqwt to libqwt4
  - Pass maintainership for x11-toolkits/qwt4
  - Rename x11-toolkits/qwt to x11-toolkits/qwt4, x11-toolkits/qwt-devel to
    x11-toolkits/qwt5
  
  PR:             ports/119904
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc at issp.ac.ru> (maintainer of x11-toolkits/qwt5)
